notes: MVP contains 22 Major Arcana. Minor Arcana can be added following the same schema.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 带着一颗赤子之心，你站在人生新旅程的起点。这是充满无限可能的时刻——放下顾虑，勇敢迈步。命运对信任它的人总是慷慨的。
cards.meaning_upright_en: With an open heart, you stand at the threshold of a new journey. This is a moment full of infinite possibility—let go of your worries and step forward bravely. Fate is generous to those who trust in it.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 冲动与莽撞可能带来不必要的麻烦。在行动之前，请先停下来想一想：这一步，你真的准备好了吗？
cards.meaning_reversed_en: Impulsiveness may lead to unnecessary trouble. Before acting, pause and ask yourself: are you truly ready for this step?

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 你拥有实现目标所需的一切资源与能力。此刻是行动的时候了——意志、技巧、创意全都在你手中。专注，并将它们发挥出来。
cards.meaning_upright_en: You possess all the resources and abilities needed to achieve your goals. Now is the time to act—willpower, skill, and creativity are all at your fingertips. Focus and let them shine.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 才能没有被充分发挥，或者有些事情并不像表面那样真实。审视内心，确保你的动机真实而纯粹。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: Your talents may not be fully utilized, or things may not be as they appear. Look inward and ensure your intentions are genuine and pure.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 沉静下来，倾听内心的声音。你的直觉比你想象的更可靠。此刻不是急于求成的时候，而是向内探索、等待时机显现的时刻。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Quiet yourself and listen to your inner voice. Your intuition is more reliable than you think. This is not the time to rush—it is a time to look inward and let the right moment reveal itself.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 你可能压制了自己的直觉，或者有些事情没有被揭示出来。给自己一些空间，让真相自然浮现。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You may be suppressing your intuition, or something important has yet to be revealed. Give yourself space for the truth to surface naturally.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 丰盛正向你涌来。这是一个充满创造力、滋养与美好的时期。照顾好自己和你爱的人，享受生命馈赠的丰饶与温柔。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Abundance flows toward you. This is a period of creativity, nurturing, and beauty. Care for yourself and those you love, and embrace the richness and tenderness that life offers.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 过度依赖他人，或者压抑了自己的创造力。是时候重新连接内在的丰盛感，好好地照顾自己了。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You may be relying too heavily on others or suppressing your creativity. It's time to reconnect with your inner abundance and give yourself the care you deserve.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 以坚定的结构与清晰的方向前进。你有能力建立秩序，掌控局面。稳健的基础是一切成就的根基。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Move forward with firm structure and clear direction. You have the ability to establish order and take charge. A solid foundation is the basis of all achievement.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 过度控制或固执己见可能阻碍进展。试着放松一些，聆听他人的声音，弹性也是力量。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: Over-control or stubbornness may be hindering progress. Try to relax and listen to others—flexibility is also a form of strength.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 传统与智慧为你提供指引。寻求来自导师、信仰或内心价值观的支持，它们在此时是宝贵的资源。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Tradition and wisdom offer you guidance. Seek support from mentors, beliefs, or your core values—they are precious resources at this time.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 你可能感到被传统束缚，渴望打破常规。在颠覆之前，思考一下什么是真正值得保留的。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You may feel constrained by tradition and long to break free. Before overturning everything, reflect on what is truly worth preserving.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 爱与和谐的能量环绕着你。不仅是感情，更是内心深处对自我价值观的一次重要选择。做出真实于内心的决定。
cards.meaning_upright_en: The energy of love and harmony surrounds you. This goes beyond romance—it represents a significant choice aligned with your deepest values. Make the decision that is true to your heart.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 关系中出现失衡，或者你在面临一个艰难的抉择。倾听内心真正的渴望，而不是外部压力。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: There may be imbalance in a relationship, or you face a difficult choice. Listen to your heart's true longing rather than external pressures.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 以坚定的意志和明确的方向前进。胜利属于那些能在矛盾中保持平衡的人。驾驭你内心的力量，向目标奔驰。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Move forward with firm will and clear direction. Victory belongs to those who maintain balance amid contradiction. Harness your inner power and charge toward your goal.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 方向感模糊，或者内心的两股力量在拉扯。先找回你的核心，再决定下一步。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: Direction may feel unclear, or two inner forces are pulling you apart. Rediscover your center before deciding on your next step.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 真正的力量来自温柔而非强硬。你拥有内心的勇气与耐心，足以应对眼前的挑战。以爱和平静面对一切。
cards.meaning_upright_en: True strength comes from gentleness, not force. You possess the inner courage and patience to face the challenges ahead. Meet everything with love and calm.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 你可能在怀疑自己的能力。记住，力量不是没有恐惧，而是带着恐惧仍然前行。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You may be doubting your abilities. Remember, strength is not the absence of fear—it is moving forward despite it.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 是时候独处、沉思与寻找内在指引了。退后一步，远离喧嚣，你会在静默中发现自己最需要的答案。
cards.meaning_upright_en: It is time to be alone, to reflect and seek inner guidance. Step back from the noise, and in the silence you will find the answers you most need.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 过度孤立可能让你与世界脱节。适当的独处是智慧，但也需要在时机成熟时走出来与他人连接。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: Excessive isolation may be disconnecting you from the world. Solitude is wise in moderation, but the right time to step out and connect with others will also come.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 命运的轮盘正在转动，新的循环即将开始。变化是生命的常态，此刻的转机将为你带来新的可能性。
cards.meaning_upright_en: The wheel of fate is turning and a new cycle is about to begin. Change is the natural order of life, and this turning point brings new possibilities.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 感觉被命运的波折所困。记住，轮子始终在转，低谷只是另一个高峰的前奏。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You may feel trapped by fate's ups and downs. Remember, the wheel is always turning—a low point is simply the prelude to the next peak.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 事情将会得到公正的裁决。你的行动与后果始终相连。诚实地面对自己和他人，结果将是公平的。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Matters will be resolved fairly. Your actions and their consequences are always connected. Be honest with yourself and others, and the outcome will be just.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 感到不公平或承担了不属于你的责任。审视一下，哪些地方需要更多的诚实与担当。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You may feel treated unfairly or carrying responsibility that isn't yours. Examine where more honesty and accountability are needed.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 暂停，让自己悬在空中一会儿。从不同角度看问题，主动的等待有时比急于行动更有力量。放下，才能看见。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Pause and allow yourself to hang in suspension for a while. Seeing things from a different angle can be powerful. Active waiting is sometimes stronger than rushing forward. Let go to gain sight.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 你在拖延或逃避一个必要的决定。也许是时候接受现实，做出那个一直回避的选择了。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You may be stalling or avoiding a necessary decision. Perhaps it's time to accept reality and make the choice you've been putting off.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 结束是为了新的开始。放下不再服务于你的旧有模式与关系，这是蜕变的时刻。变化虽然不易，却是成长最深刻的礼物。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Endings exist to make way for new beginnings. Release the old patterns and relationships that no longer serve you—this is a moment of transformation. Change is never easy, yet it is growth's most profound gift.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 抗拒改变让你停滞不前。是时候承认，某些事情确实需要画上句号，才能继续前行。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: Resistance to change is keeping you stagnant. It's time to acknowledge that some things truly need to end before you can move forward.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 寻找平衡与和谐。将不同的元素融合在一起，找到中间的道路。耐心与流动，正是此刻所需的能量。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Seek balance and harmony. Blend different elements together and find the middle path. Patience and flow are the energies needed right now.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 生活中某些方面过于极端。过度放纵或过度压抑都会打破平衡。找到你的中心。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: Some aspects of life have become too extreme. Both overindulgence and excessive restriction break balance. Find your center.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 注意那些束缚你的执念与恐惧。你比你想象的更自由——那些锁链，也许并没有想象中那么牢固。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Notice the obsessions and fears that bind you. You are freer than you believe—those chains may not be as strong as they appear.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 你开始意识到那些让你受困的模式，并准备挣脱。这是解放的开始，勇敢地走出来。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You are becoming aware of the patterns that have kept you trapped and are ready to break free. This is the beginning of liberation—step out bravely.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 突如其来的变化打破了旧有的结构。虽然震动令人不安，但清除腐朽的基础，才能为真正稳固的未来铺路。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Sudden change shatters old structures. Though the upheaval is unsettling, clearing away the decayed foundation is what makes room for a truly solid future.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 你在回避一个不可避免的崩塌。也许现在就接受它，比等到它自己倒塌要好得多。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You may be avoiding an inevitable collapse. Perhaps accepting it now is far better than waiting for it to fall on its own.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 经历风雨之后，希望之星照亮前路。你被宇宙温柔地托举着。相信自己，相信未来，一切都会越来越好。
cards.meaning_upright_en: After the storm, the star of hope lights your path. You are gently held by the universe. Trust in yourself and in the future—things will keep getting better.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 你暂时失去了对未来的信心。让自己休息一下，希望的光芒不会永远消失，它只是暂时被云遮住了。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You have temporarily lost faith in the future. Allow yourself to rest—the light of hope never disappears for good; it is simply hidden by clouds for now.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 在迷雾与幻象中，你的直觉是最可靠的向导。不要被表象所迷惑，深入内心去感知真实发生的事情。
cards.meaning_upright_en: In mist and illusion, your intuition is the most reliable guide. Don't be fooled by appearances—look inward to sense what is truly happening.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 恐惧与焦虑可能正在扭曲你的判断。把那些压抑的情绪带到意识层面，让光照进去。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: Fear and anxiety may be distorting your judgment. Bring those suppressed emotions into conscious awareness and let the light in.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 光明、喜悦与成功向你涌来。这是一个充满活力与自信的时期。尽情绽放你的光芒，与他人共享这份幸福。
cards.meaning_upright_en: Light, joy, and success flow toward you. This is a period of vitality and confidence. Let your light shine fully and share this happiness with others.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 也许你在刻意压制自己的喜悦，或者对前景过于悲观。阳光仍在，只需放开遮挡它的手。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: Perhaps you are suppressing your joy or being too pessimistic about the future. The sunshine is still there—just open your hands and stop blocking it.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 你听到了内心深处的召唤。这是一次蜕变与觉醒的时刻，过去的一切经历都是为此刻做准备。勇敢回应你的使命。
cards.meaning_upright_en: You hear a calling from deep within. This is a moment of transformation and awakening—every past experience has been preparing you for this. Bravely answer your calling.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 你在评判自己过于严苛，或者在回避一个重要的人生抉择。放下自我批判，以宽容面对自己的旅程。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: You may be judging yourself too harshly or avoiding a significant life choice. Release self-judgment and approach your journey with compassion.

cards.meaning_upright_zh: 你完成了一个重要的循环，值得为此庆祝。整合所有的经历与智慧，你准备好迈向下一个更宽广的篇章。
cards.meaning_upright_en: You have completed an important cycle and it deserves to be celebrated. With all your experiences and wisdom integrated, you are ready to step into the next, wider chapter.
cards.meaning_reversed_zh: 某件事还没有完全完成。再坚持一下，真正的圆满近在眼前。不要在终点前放弃。
cards.meaning_reversed_en: Something has not yet been fully completed. Hold on a little longer—true fulfillment is just around the corner. Don't give up at the finish line.
